jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at BigBasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a SEO Specialist in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
